title: House passes affordable housing bill, sends it to Trump's desk
summary: The House of Representatives passed legislation designed to address housing affordability by reducing costs for homebuyers and limiting private equity's role in the residential real estate market. The bill now awaits President Trump's signature, adding to his agenda the politically charged issue of housing accessibility and cost. The legislation reflects growing concern over institutional investment's impact on housing availability.
content: The House on Tuesday gave final passage to a bill aimed at lowering costs for homebuyers and reining in private equity.

zh.title: 众议院通过可负担住房法案，送交特朗普签署
zh.summary: 众议院通过了旨在通过降低购房成本和限制私募股权在住宅房地产市场中的角色来解决住房可负担性问题的立法。该法案现在等待特朗普总统的签署，将住房可及性和成本这一政治敏感议题加入他的议程。该立法反映了人们对机构投资对住房供应影响的日益关注。

title: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
summary: Google's YouTube has settled a social media addiction lawsuit brought by a 15-year-old plaintiff, removing the platform as a defendant from broader litigation against major tech companies. Three other tech giants face similar cases beginning next month, signaling mounting legal pressure on social media platforms over addiction concerns. The settlement suggests potential industry recognition of platform responsibility in youth engagement.
content: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.

zh.title: 谷歌YouTube与青少年和解社交媒体成瘾案件
zh.summary: 谷歌YouTube与提起诉讼的15岁原告达成和解，将该平台从针对主要科技公司的更广泛诉讼中移除。其他三家科技巨头将在下个月开始面临类似案件，表明社交媒体平台在成瘾问题上面临的法律压力不断增加。该和解表明该行业可能认可平台在青少年参与中的责任。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Tech stocks experienced a significant decline on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 falling 1.4% and the Nasdaq Composite dropping 2.2%, driven by steep losses in chipmaker stocks including a 13% decline for Micron Technology. The broad market sell-off reflects investor concerns about the technology sector's valuation and profitability outlook. Traders are monitoring for catalysts that could either extend the decline or stabilize prices.
content: A global rout in tech stocks led to the S&P 500 falling 1.4% and the Nasdaq Composite tumbling 2.2% on Tuesday. Micron Technology suffered a 13% slide.

zh.title: 周三的大股票故事：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 科技股周二大幅下跌，标普500指数下跌1.4%，纳斯达克综合指数下跌2.2%，芯片制造商股票大幅下跌，包括美光科技下跌13%。广泛的市场抛售反映了投资者对科技行业估值和盈利前景的担忧。交易员正在监测可能延续跌势或稳定价格的催化剂。

title: The biggest wealth transfer in history is here: how the next generation will spend the trillions
summary: A historic generational wealth transfer spanning trillions of dollars is underway as younger heirs inherit fortunes from previous generations, signaling a potential shift in how wealth is deployed and invested globally. The next generation is expected to direct inherited wealth differently than their predecessors, potentially impacting markets, philanthropy, and economic priorities. This wealth redistribution could reshape investment patterns and consumer behavior worldwide.
content: The greatest wealth transfer is underway, and heirs around the world who are set to inherit billions are preparing to use the money very differently from the generations that built it.

zh.title: 历史上最大的财富转移正在进行：下一代如何花费数万亿
zh.summary: 一场跨越数万亿美元的历史性代际财富转移正在进行中，年轻继承人从前几代人继承财富，预示着全球财富部署和投资方式可能出现转变。下一代预计将以不同于前人的方式管理继承的财富，可能会影响市场、慈善事业和经济优先事项。这种财富再分配可能会重塑全球投资模式和消费者行为。

title: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba sues US government over defence blacklist
summary: Alibaba, China's major e-commerce company, has filed suit against the U.S. Department of Defense after being placed on a blacklist of firms allegedly linked to the Chinese military. The lawsuit represents a significant escalation in tensions between Chinese tech companies and U.S. regulatory authorities over military-related designations. The case highlights ongoing geopolitical friction between the U.S. and China over corporate ties.
content: It is suing the US defence department after it was added to a list of firms with ties to the Chinese military.

zh.title: 中国电商巨头阿里巴巴起诉美国政府防务黑名单
zh.summary: 中国主要电商公司阿里巴巴在被列入据称与中国军方有关联的公司黑名单后，对美国国防部提起诉讼。该诉讼代表了中国科技公司与美国监管当局之间因军事相关指定而升级的紧张关系。该案凸显了美国和中国在企业关系上持续的地缘政治摩擦。

title: Stanford was their golden ticket - could AI help or hinder that?
summary: Stanford University graduates shared their perspectives on artificial intelligence and its potential impact on higher education's value as a career credential and pathway. The discussion explores whether AI might undermine traditional university education's relevance or create new opportunities and enhance its value. Stanford alumni's views carry significance given the university's prominence in technology and influence on the AI industry.
content: The BBC spoke with Stanford University graduates about what they really think about artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 斯坦福是他们的黄金门票 - AI会帮助还是阻碍它?
zh.summary: 斯坦福大学毕业生分享了他们对人工智能及其对高等教育作为职业凭证和途径价值的潜在影响的看法。讨论探讨AI是否可能削弱传统大学教育的相关性,或创造新机遇并增强其价值。考虑到斯坦福大学在技术领域的突出地位和对AI产业的影响力,校友的观点具有重要意义。

title: SpaceX pulls off one of the biggest AI debt deals yet
summary: SpaceX has orchestrated one of the largest AI-related debt offerings to date, set to close Friday and provide capital to refinance existing obligations. The successful deal underscores investor confidence in SpaceX's business model and growth prospects despite challenging capital markets. The transaction highlights investor appetite for financing at the intersection of AI investment and commercial space exploration.
content: The offering is set to close on Friday and help SpaceX pay off its existing debt

zh.title: SpaceX成功完成迄今为止最大的AI债务交易之一
zh.summary: SpaceX策划了迄今为止最大的AI相关债务发行之一,预计周五完成,为现有债务再融资提供资金。这笔成功的交易强调了投资者对SpaceX业务模式和增长前景的信心,尽管资本市场面临挑战。该交易突显了投资者对AI投资与商业太空探索交汇处融资的需求。

title: Ten years on, Brexit's economic impact is becoming clearer
summary: A decade after the Brexit referendum, the economic impact of the UK's departure from the European Union is becoming evident as analysts assess whether earlier predictions of sustained damage have materialized. Initial warnings of severe long-term economic harm are now being evaluated against actual economic performance and trade data. This retrospective analysis is critical for understanding Brexit's real costs and benefits and informing future policy.
content: A decade ago, many economists argued the UK would sustain longer-term economic damage by leaving the EU. So what did happen?

zh.title: 十年后,英国脱欧的经济影响变得更加清晰
zh.summary: 在英国脱欧公投十年后,随着分析师评估早期的持续损害预测是否已经实现,英国脱欧对其离开欧盟的经济影响变得显而易见。关于长期经济伤害的初期警告现在与实际经济表现和贸易数据进行比较。这种回顾性分析对于理解英国脱欧的真实成本和收益以及为未来政策提供信息至关重要。

title: The economic challenges facing the next prime minister
summary: Britain's incoming prime minister will confront persistent fiscal challenges and structural economic issues regardless of who leads.
content: Though the person in charge of the country will change, the fiscal issues remain the same.

zh.title: 下一任首相面临的经济挑战
zh.summary: 无论谁领导，英国的新任首相都将面临持续的财政挑战和结构性经济问题。

title: ‘It seems too good to be true’: At a steak-dinner retirement seminar, the guy said annuities can outperform the market. Is that true?
summary: A retirement seminar presenter claimed fixed-rate annuities dramatically outperform stock markets, raising questions about the validity of such investment claims.
content: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments.”

zh.title: "这似乎好得不像真的"：在牛排晚宴退休研讨会上，那个人说年金可以超越市场。这是真的吗？
zh.summary: 一位退休研讨会主持人声称固定利率年金的表现远优于股票市场，这引发了对此类投资声称有效性的质疑。

title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
summary: A reader seeks legal strategies to ensure an estate passes to their sons without being transferred to or controlled by a former spouse.
content: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”

zh.title: 我想把所有东西留给我的儿子们，但我害怕他们会把它给我的前夫。我怎样才能阻止这种情况？
zh.summary: 一位读者寻求法律策略，以确保遗产传递给他们的儿子，而不被转移给或由前配偶控制。

title: Cerebras falls 10% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
summary: AI chipmaker Cerebras declined 10% after reporting its first earnings as a public company, citing forecast margin compression.
content: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.

zh.title: 芯片制造商在上市后首份财报中预测利润率下降后，Cerebras股价下跌10%
zh.summary: 人工智能芯片制造商Cerebras在作为上市公司报告首份财报后下跌10%，理由是预测利润率压缩。

title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
summary: A 67-year-old homeowner with $950,000 in retirement savings and outright home ownership evaluates whether to claim Social Security now or maximize future payments.
content: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”

zh.title: "我们完全拥有我们的房子"：我67岁，年收入100,000美元。我应该现在领取每年30,000美元的社会保障还是等待？
zh.summary: 一位67岁的房屋所有者，拥有950,000美元的退休储蓄和完全拥有的住房，正在评估是现在申请社会保障还是最大化未来支付。

title: Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan to begin for ships stranded in Persian Gulf, maritime organization says
summary: More than 11,000 seafarers stranded in the Persian Gulf will begin a large-scale evacuation through the Strait of Hormuz in a plan backed by both Iran and the U.S. This coordinated effort addresses a significant maritime crisis involving workers trapped in the region.
content: More than 11,000 seafarers stuck in the Persian Gulf will begin to exit through the Hormuz Strait in a large-scale evacuation plan backed by Iran and the U.S.

zh.title: 海事组织表示，霍尔木兹海峡疏散计划将开始为滞留在波斯湾的船只服务
zh.summary: 滞留在波斯湾的11,000多名海员将通过伊朗和美国支持的计划开始通过霍尔木兹海峡进行大规模疏散。这一协调努力解决了涉及困在该地区工人的重大海事危机。

title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks are falling in response
summary: CEO Mark Zuckerberg has directed Meta staff to develop a prediction markets platform internally called "Arena." The announcement has triggered stock declines as markets react to the new strategic initiative.
content: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."

zh.title: Meta正在开发预测市场应用程序。这些股票因此下跌
zh.summary: CEO马克·扎克伯格已指示Meta员工开发一个内部称为"Arena"的预测市场平台。该公告引发了股价下跌，因为市场对这一新的战略举措做出了反应。

title: Inside Kevin Warsh's selection process for the next Atlanta Fed president
summary: New Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh is overseeing the selection process for the next president of the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta. This appointment represents an opportunity to reshape the direction and leadership of the central bank.
content: Choosing a new head for the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta is an opportunity for new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh to reshape the central bank.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什选择下一任亚特兰大美联储主席的内部流程
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什正在监督亚特兰大美联储银行下一任主席的选拔过程。这一任命代表了重塑中央银行方向和领导层的机会。

title: SpaceX stock’s wild price swings since its IPO show how risky leveraged ETFs can be
summary: SpaceX stock has experienced dramatic price swings since its IPO this month, demonstrating the significant risks associated with leveraged ETF investments in individual stocks. The volatility serves as a cautionary tale for investors considering leveraged bets.
content: The excitement around SpaceX shares has quickly faded after they soared in their market debut this month — providing a crushing reminder of just how risky it is to make leveraged bets on single stocks via the exchange-traded-fund market.

zh.title: SpaceX股票自IPO以来的剧烈价格波动表明杠杆ETF有多危险
zh.summary: SpaceX股票自本月IPO以来经历了剧烈的价格波动，表明杠杆ETF对个股的投资风险很大。这种波动性对考虑进行杠杆投资的投资者来说是一个警示故事。

title: Gold and silver tumble as rate-hike fears hit precious metals
summary: Gold and silver prices fell sharply as rate-hike concerns pressured the precious metals market, prompting major Wall Street banks to reassess their price forecasts. The decline reflects broader investor anxiety about monetary policy shifts.
content: Gold and silver fell Tuesday as rate-hike fears pressured precious metals and Wall Street banks reassessed their gold forecasts.

zh.title: 黄金和白银因加息担忧而下跌，贵金属市场受压
zh.summary: 黄金和白银价格因加息担忧而急剧下跌，压低了贵金属市场，促使华尔街主要银行重新评估其价格预测。下跌反映了投资者对货币政策变化的更广泛焦虑。

title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
summary: A single QR code coupon reduced a customer's Walgreens prescription cost from $618 to $15 for a generic medication. The dramatic savings highlight the potential of discount programs to make pharmaceutical treatments significantly more affordable.
content: “This medication was generic.”

zh.title: "感觉像医学奇迹"：一张二维码优惠券如何将我618美元的沃尔格林处方费降至15美元？
zh.summary: 一张二维码优惠券将一位顾客在沃尔格林的处方费用从618美元降至15美元（学名药）。这笔巨大的节省突出了折扣计划使药物治疗显著更实惠的潜力。

title: This tech ‘fear gauge’ is nearing a two-decade high. Investors should worry.
summary: The VIX, Wall Street's primary volatility "fear gauge," is approaching a 20-year high, signaling elevated investor anxiety. Some analysts question whether the VIX remains the most effective indicator for tracking stock market volatility.
content: Wall Street’s main ‘fear gauge,’ the ‘VIX’ might not be the best way to track this volatility in stocks

zh.title: 这项科技"恐慌指数"接近二十年高位。投资者应该担心。
zh.summary: VIX是华尔街主要的波动性"恐慌指数"，正接近20年高位，表明投资者焦虑升高。一些分析师质疑VIX是否仍是追踪股市波动的最有效指标。

title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
summary: Approximately 40 million SpaceX shares, representing 5-7% of publicly available stock, are currently sold short, indicating measured short-seller interest despite Elon Musk's dominant position. The relatively low short interest suggests many investors remain hesitant to bet against the company.
content: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.

zh.title: SpaceX吸引到一些空头卖家的兴趣，但许多人仍害怕做空马斯克。
zh.summary: 约4000万SpaceX股票（占可公开交易股票的5-7%）目前处于卖空状态，表明尽管埃隆·马斯克占据主导地位，但空头仍有一定兴趣。相对较低的卖空兴趣表明许多投资者仍然不愿与该公司对赌。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Micron Technology, SpaceX, IBM, Flex & more
summary: Micron Technology, SpaceX, IBM, Flex, and other stocks are experiencing significant price movements during midday trading. These moves reflect broader market dynamics affecting multiple sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

zh.title: 午盘涨跌最大的股票：美光科技、SpaceX、IBM、Flex等
zh.summary: 美光科技、SpaceX、IBM、Flex和其他股票在午盘交易中经历显著的价格波动。这些波动反映了影响多个部门的更广泛的市场动态。

title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
summary: American workers' 401(k) retirement account balances reached record levels in 2025, according to Vanguard's latest "How America Saves" report. The milestone reflects strong market performance that benefited workplace retirement savings across the country.
content: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report

zh.title: 美国人的401(k)余额去年创历史新高。看看你的情况如何。
zh.summary: 根据先锋集团最新的《美国人如何储蓄》报告，美国工人的401(k)退休账户余额在2025年达到历史新高。这个里程碑反映了强劲的市场表现，使全国工作场所的退休储蓄受益。

title: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
summary: Meta has halted an employee monitoring program that tracked workers' computer usage for AI training data after just two months of operation due to privacy concerns. The decision reflects growing employee and public sensitivity around data collection practices.
content: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.

zh.title: Meta因隐私担忧暂停用于AI训练的员工跟踪
zh.summary: Meta已暂停员工监控计划，该计划仅运行两个月后因隐私担忧而叫停。该计划原本用于跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取AI训练数据。这个决定反映了员工和公众对数据收集做法日益增长的敏感性。

title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
summary: Workers claiming Social Security benefits before reaching full retirement age can face unexpected withholdings if they continue working, but the withheld amounts are not permanently lost. Understanding these rules helps retirees maintain income while protecting long-term benefits.
content: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.

zh.title: 如何在退休后工作而不被削减社会保障支票
zh.summary: 在达到完全退休年龄之前申请社会保障福利的工人如果继续工作可能会面临意外的扣缴，但被扣缴的金额并不会永久丧失。理解这些规则有助于退休人员保持收入同时保护长期福利。

title: Your index fund is hiding a looming tech-stock risk — here is how to protect your portfolio
summary: The S&P 500's top 10 stocks now represent an unprecedented concentration within index funds, creating significant portfolio risk that investors may not realize. Diversification strategies can help mitigate exposure to this tech-heavy concentration.
content: The S&P 500’s top 10 stocks dominate like never before. Here is a better way to invest.

zh.title: 你的指数基金隐藏着即将到来的科技股风险——如何保护你的投资组合
zh.summary: 标普500指数的前10大股票现在在指数基金中的集中度达到前所未有的水平，给投资者带来了他们可能没有意识到的显著投资组合风险。多元化策略可以帮助降低对这种科技密集型集中的风险敞口。

title: SpaceX could remain under pressure as more insiders gain permission to sell. Here are the key dates
summary: SpaceX stock may face continued downward pressure as upcoming lockup expirations allow company insiders to sell their shares. These supply waves could significantly impact the stock's price at key expiration dates.
content: Investors can expect a significant wave of supply to hit the market that will likely drive the price down, with each new lockup expiration period.

zh.title: SpaceX可能继续面临压力，因为更多内部人士获得出售权限。以下是关键日期
zh.summary: 随着即将到期的锁定期允许公司内部人士出售他们的股票，SpaceX股票可能会继续面临下行压力。这些供应浪潮可能会在关键到期日期对股票价格产生重大影响。

title: Tech stocks tumble on concerns over AI spending
summary: Major technology stocks declined sharply as investors question the sustainability of corporate AI spending and the broader artificial intelligence investment boom. The sell-off reflects growing skepticism about whether current AI spending levels can be justified by future returns.
content: A sudden wave of selling in major tech shares triggers doubt over the sustainability of the AI boom.

zh.title: 科技股因对人工智能支出的担忧而暴跌
zh.summary: 随着投资者对企业人工智能支出的可持续性和更广泛的人工智能投资热潮提出质疑，主要科技股大幅下跌。此次抛售反映了人们对当前人工智能支出水平是否能由未来回报所合理化的日益增长的怀疑。

title: Nasdaq futures tumble 3% as chip stocks routed around the globe, Micron drops 9%: Live updates: Live updates
summary: Tech stocks experienced a significant selloff, with Nasdaq futures down 3% and semiconductor stocks particularly hard hit, including Micron's 9% drop. This reflects broader concerns about the tech sector and chip market dragging down major indices like the S&P 500.
content: Tech giants tumbled in Monday's regular trading, dragging down the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite.

zh.title: 纳斯达克期货下跌3%，全球芯片股遭抛售，美光下跌9%：实时更新
zh.summary: 科技股遭遇大幅抛售，纳斯达克期货下跌3%，半导体股票受创尤重，包括美光下跌9%。这反映了对科技行业和芯片市场的更广泛担忧，拖累了标普500等主要指数。

title: Stop pretending EU's new border system is working, says airports chief
summary: Europe's airport industry leader has expressed serious concerns about the effectiveness of the EU's new Entry/Exit System (EES), warning it could create significant operational challenges during peak summer travel. The criticism highlights potential logistical issues that may impact airport operations across the continent.
content: The head of Europe's airports lobby says concerns over EES are keeping him awake at night and he doesn't know how airports will cope over the summer.

zh.title: 欧洲机场首脑说：别再假装欧盟新边境系统有效了
zh.summary: 欧洲机场业领导人对欧盟新出入境系统(EES)的有效性表示严重担忧，警告称在夏季高峰旅行期间可能造成重大运营挑战。这一批评突显了可能影响整个欧洲大陆机场运营的潜在物流问题。

title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
summary: A homeowner is asking for advice on whether to request payment from a guest who left heat damage on furniture without mentioning it. The situation raises questions about guest responsibility and home maintenance cost-sharing.
content: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”

zh.title: 我的女性住客在我的桌子上留下了热痕。她离开后我才发现。我应该要求她支付清除费用吗?
zh.summary: 一位房主在询问是否应该要求一位未提及就在家具上留下热损伤的客人支付费用。这种情况引发了关于客人责任和家居维护成本分担的问题。

title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
summary: Meta has launched smart glasses priced at $299, continuing CEO Mark Zuckerberg's focus on wearable technology as a key growth area. The company views these glasses as a stepping stone toward future devices with integrated lens displays.
content: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.

zh.title: 扎克伯格持续推动可穿戴设备，Meta宣布推出299美元起价的智能眼镜
zh.summary: Meta推出了299美元的智能眼镜，继续首席执行官马克·扎克伯格对可穿戴技术作为关键增长领域的关注。该公司将这些眼镜视为未来集成镜片显示设备的垫脚石。

title: Stock investors expect the Fed to save them. But no ‘Warsh put’ is coming — and the ‘Greenspan put’ was a myth.
summary: Many investors believe the Federal Reserve will intervene to protect stock portfolios, but historical analysis suggests this expectation is unfounded—the Greenspan put was based on misinterpretation of Fed policy during the dot-com crash. The article argues that the Fed follows predetermined rules rather than acting as an investment safety net.
content: Wall Street’s belief in a central bank safety net misreads the dot-com crash. Alan Greenspan was following rules — not saving portfolios.

zh.title: 股票投资者期望美联储救助，但"沃什看跌期权"不会到来——"格林斯潘看跌期权"是个神话
zh.summary: 许多投资者相信美联储会进行干预以保护股票投资组合，但历史分析表明这一期望毫无根据——格林斯潘看跌期权是基于对互联网泡沫期间美联储政策的误解。文章主张美联储遵循预定规则，而不是充当投资安全网。

title: Investor assumptions about the AI trade are starting to stretch reality, Goldman Sachs says
summary: Goldman Sachs warns that investor expectations for artificial intelligence investments may be outpacing the technology's actual near-term delivery capabilities. This suggests potential market overvaluation in AI-related stocks as enthusiasm disconnects from realistic timelines.
content: Investors may be racing ahead of what the AI trade can deliver, warns Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 高盛表示投资者对人工智能交易的假设开始偏离现实
zh.summary: 高盛警告称，投资者对人工智能投资的期望可能超过该技术的实际近期交付能力。这表明随着热情与现实时间表脱节，人工智能相关股票可能存在市场高估。

title: Everyday investors fueled the SpaceX trading frenzy. Now they face a bear market.
summary: Retail investors have made significant bets on SpaceX stock ranging from large retirement account positions to day trades, but are now contending with a bearish market following the company's IPO. The shift highlights the risks retail investors face when entering volatile growth stocks.
content: From six-figure retirement gambles to tactical day trades, retail investors have made big bets on SpaceX’s volatile stock.

zh.title: 散户投资者推动了SpaceX交易热潮。现在他们面临熊市。
zh.summary: 散户投资者在SpaceX股票上进行了大额投资,涉及大额退休账户头寸到日内交易,但在公司首次公开募股后现在面临看跌市场。这一转变突出了散户投资者在进入波动性增长股票时面临的风险。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: SpaceX, Micron, Nvidia, Tesla, IBM, Broadcom, Target, Netflix & more
summary: Wall Street analysts released major stock recommendations covering key companies including SpaceX, semiconductor makers, and consumer retailers on Tuesday. These calls represent the market's consensus on key investment opportunities and risks.
content: Here are Tuesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周二最大的分析师评级：SpaceX、美光、英伟达、特斯拉、IBM、博通、目标、网飞及其他
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师在周二发布了主要股票推荐,涵盖SpaceX、半导体制造商和消费零售商等关键公司。这些评级代表了市场对关键投资机会和风险的共识。

title: SpaceX stock seesaws following $400 billion sell-off
summary: SpaceX stock has experienced volatility after a significant sell-off of approximately $400 billion in value following its record IPO debut. The stock's movement reflects investor uncertainty about the company's valuation and growth prospects.
content: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.

zh.title: SpaceX股票在400亿美元抛售后剧烈波动
zh.summary: SpaceX股票在创纪录的首次公开募股后经历了大约400亿美元的重大抛售,导致股价波动。股票的走势反映了投资者对公司估值和增长前景的不确定性。

title: Five things to watch in Tuesday's primaries as New York races take center stage
summary: Upcoming primary elections in New York, Maryland, and Utah will test the influence of outside spending, party leadership, and key political figures including Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump. The races provide insight into current political dynamics and voter priorities.
content: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.

zh.title: 周二初选中值得关注的五件事——纽约竞选成焦点
zh.summary: 纽约、马里兰州和犹他州即将举行的初选将考验外部支出、政党领导层和包括佐赫兰·曼达尼和唐纳德·特朗普在内的关键政治人物的影响力。这些竞选提供了对当前政治动态和选民优先事项的洞察。

title: AI groups spend $20 million going head-to-head in New York race pitting Bores, Lasher, Schlossberg
summary: Interest groups are investing heavily—$20 million—in the Manhattan House Democratic primary to influence AI policy positions among the candidates. This spending reflects how AI regulation has become a major political battleground at the federal level.
content: Companies are spending big to shape AI policies at the federal level. And the Manhattan House Democratic primary will be a test of where voters stand.

zh.title: AI团体在纽约众议院初选中斥资2000万美元对决——博雷斯、拉舍尔和施洛斯伯格
zh.summary: 利益团体在曼哈顿众议院民主党初选中大力投资2000万美元，以影响候选人的人工智能政策立场。这一支出反映了人工智能监管如何成为联邦层面的主要政治战场。

title: AI memory startup focused on cutting token costs raises $98 million
summary: Engram, an AI startup addressing rising costs associated with increasingly expensive AI models through memory optimization, has secured $98 million in funding. The company enters a growing market of solutions tackling the token-cost challenge facing the AI industry.
content: Engram enters the market as the AI industry grapples with a rising cost problem fueled by more expensive models.

zh.title: 专注降低令牌成本的AI记忆初创公司融资9800万美元
zh.summary: AI初创公司Engram通过记忆优化来解决与日益昂贵的AI模型相关的成本上升问题，已获得9800万美元融资。该公司进入了一个不断增长的市场，该市场为AI行业面临的令牌成本挑战提供解决方案。

title: I’m 70. A relative offered me a $25,000 home loan secured by a lien that must be repaid within a year. Is that fair?
summary: A 70-year-old is evaluating the fairness of a $25,000 loan offer from a family member that includes a property lien and strict one-year repayment deadline. The situation involves questions about fair lending terms and family financial relationships.
content: “He also wants me to downsize and move.”

zh.title: 我70岁。一位亲戚向我提供了25000美元的房屋贷款，由留置权担保，必须在一年内偿还。这公平吗？
zh.summary: 一位70岁的人正在评估来自家庭成员的25000美元贷款提议的公平性，该贷款包括房产留置权和严格的一年还款期限。这种情况涉及关于公平贷款条款和家庭财务关系的问题。

title: Trump Account signups now total more than 6 million, but millions more children are eligible
summary: Trump Accounts have reached over 6 million signups, but many eligible U.S. children haven't yet created accounts and could be missing out on associated savings benefits and incentives. The low adoption rate among eligible minors represents unrealized value from the program.
content: Trump Accounts will soon be available to millions of U.S. children; however, many may miss out on the savings opportunity — and free money.

zh.title: Trump账户注册人数现已超过600万，但还有数百万符合条件的儿童尚未注册
zh.summary: Trump账户已达到600万多次注册，但许多符合条件的美国儿童尚未创建账户，可能会错过相关的储蓄福利和激励措施。符合条件的未成年人中的低采用率代表了该计划未实现的价值。

title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
summary: After discussions in Switzerland regarding nuclear inspections, Iran's foreign ministry denied making new commitments on nuclear sites despite U.S. statements about resuming inspector access. The development suggests ongoing tensions in nuclear negotiations between Iran and Western nations.
content: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

zh.title: 伊朗在Vance表示将邀请核检查人员返回后称在核设施上没有做出新承诺
zh.summary: 在瑞士关于核检查的讨论后，尽管美国声称将恢复核检查人员的访问权，伊朗外交部否认在核设施上做出了新承诺。这一进展表明伊朗与西方国家之间的核谈判中存在持续紧张局势。

title: Ticket reseller StubHub ordered to refund customers over hidden fees
summary: The UK's Competition and Markets Authority ordered StubHub to refund 50,000 customers due to hidden fees and imposed a financial penalty. The action addresses unfair ticket resale practices affecting consumers.
content: The Competition and Markets Authority said StubHub must refund 50,000 customers and pay a fine.

zh.title: 票务转售商StubHub因隐藏费用被勒令退款客户
zh.summary: 英国竞争和市场管理局下令StubHub因隐藏费用退款50,000名客户，并处以经济罚款。此举旨在解决影响消费者的不公平票务转售行为。

title: Oil prices fall as investors continue to watch U.S.-Iran moves, Citi sees 'overhang' disappearing
summary: Oil prices fell Tuesday as investors assess geopolitical developments in the Middle East and anticipate potential conflict resolution. The decline reflects growing optimism about reduced tensions and market stability.
content: Oil falls Tuesday as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East, while showing optimism the conflict may end soon.

zh.title: 油价下跌，投资者继续关注美国-伊朗局势，花旗集团预期压力消散
zh.summary: 周二油价下跌，因投资者评估中东地缘政治发展并预期潜在冲突解决。价格下跌反映了对紧张局势缓和和市场稳定性的日益乐观态度。

title: Brexit 10 years later: How the UK economy and politics changed, in charts
summary: A decade after the Brexit referendum, analysis reveals significant changes across the UK economy, trade, immigration, and currency performance. The data illustrates both short and long-term impacts of Britain's EU departure.
content: Ten years after the Brexit vote, CNBC compiled these charts show how the U.K. has changed across growth, immigration, sterling, trade and politics.

zh.title: 英国脱欧10年后：英国经济和政治的变化
zh.summary: 在英国脱欧公投十年后，分析揭示了英国经济、贸易、移民和货币表现的重大变化。数据说明了英国离开欧盟的短期和长期影响。

title: Tension 'likely' in new government - ex-chief
summary: Former UK chief Kristina Moore predicts the incoming government will experience considerable internal tensions and policy clashes among senior officials. The warning suggests challenges ahead for government cohesion.
content: Kristina Moore says she expects to see "some quite considerable clashes" between senior politicians.

zh.title: 新政府中"可能"存在紧张局势 - 前任首席
zh.summary: 前英国首席克里斯蒂娜·摩尔预测即将上任的政府将在高级官员之间经历相当大的内部紧张局势和政策冲突。这一警告预示着政府凝聚力面临的挑战。

title: Global M&A deal value on track to reach $4 trillion this year: PwC
summary: Global mergers and acquisitions are projected to reach $4 trillion in 2026, marking the strongest year since 2021 according to PwC analysis. The surge reflects renewed business confidence and strategic dealmaking activity.
content: Global deal value of M&A is on track to reach $4 trillion in 2026, making it the strongest year since 2021

zh.title: 全球并购交易价值有望今年达到4万亿美元：普华永道
zh.summary: 根据普华永道分析，全球并购预计在2026年达到4万亿美元，创2021年以来最强劲的一年。这一激增反映了商业信心的恢复和战略并购活动。

title: Australia's coal and gas exports violate our human rights, group says in new UN case
summary: An advocacy group filed a UN case arguing that Australia's continued approval of fossil fuel exports violates citizens' human rights protections. The action represents a legal challenge to Australia's energy export policies.
content: The group says that it is unlawful for Australia to continue approving fossil fuel exports without protecting its citizens.

zh.title: 澳大利亚的煤炭和天然气出口侵犯人权，该组织在新的联合国案件中表示
zh.summary: 一个倡导组织向联合国提交了一起案件，辩称澳大利亚继续批准化石燃料出口违反了公民的人权保护。该行动代表了对澳大利亚能源出口政策的法律挑战。

title: How a $4 billion Indian startup won Meta's backing but lost its founder to WhatsApp
summary: Indian fintech startup Cred will raise $900 million in a Meta-led funding round but loses its founder and CEO who is joining WhatsApp. The leadership transition marks a significant shift for the $4 billion company.
content: Indian fintech startup Cred will raise $900 million in a round led by Meta, but has lost its founder and CEO to WhatsApp.

zh.title: 一家40亿美元的印度初创公司如何获得Meta支持，却将创始人输给了WhatsApp
zh.summary: 印度金融科技初创公司Cred将在Meta主导的融资轮中筹集9亿美元，但其创始人兼首席执行官加入了WhatsApp。这一领导层变化对这家40亿美元的公司来说标志着重大转变。

title: Can you refuse to work or send your kids to school during a heatwave?
summary: As extreme temperatures approach, workers and parents face questions about their legal rights to refuse work or school attendance during dangerous heat conditions. Understanding these protections is essential during severe weather.
content: As temperatures increase significantly over the next few days, these are your rights.

zh.title: 在热浪期间，你可以拒绝工作或让孩子停课吗？
zh.summary: 随着极端高温的逼近，工作人员和家长面临着在危险高温条件下拒绝工作或让孩子上学的法律权利问题。在恶劣天气期间，了解这些保护措施至关重要。

title: China's 618 shopping festival growth slows sharply as consumer spending malaise persists
summary: China's 618 shopping festival growth significantly slowed as consumer spending remains subdued, reflecting broader economic weakness. The data reinforces concerns about domestic consumption recovery in the world's second-largest economy.
content: The latest consumer data reinforce how consumption in China remains subdued.

zh.title: 消费支出困境持续，中国618购物节增长急剧放缓
zh.summary: 随着消费支出保持低迷，中国618购物节增长显著放缓，反映了更广泛的经济疲弱。这些数据加强了人们对全球第二大经济体国内消费复苏的担忧。

title: 'I like their money': Trump threatens lawsuits against ABC for reporting on Reflecting Pool
summary: Donald Trump threatened legal action against ABC News over their reporting on the Reflecting Pool, continuing his adversarial stance with the broadcaster. The threat coincides with two ongoing FCC investigations into ABC.
content: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.

zh.title: "我喜欢他们的钱"：特朗普威胁就美国广播公司反思池报道提起诉讼
zh.summary: 唐纳德·特朗普因美国广播公司关于反思池的报道而威胁采取法律行动，继续与该媒体保持对抗立场。这一威胁恰逢针对美国广播公司的两项正在进行的美国联邦通信委员会调查。

title: Tech giant Oracle cuts 21,000 jobs as it embraces AI
summary: Oracle is eliminating 21,000 jobs as it prioritizes artificial intelligence investments, reflecting a sector-wide trend among major tech companies. The cuts underscore significant capital reallocation toward AI capabilities across the industry.
content: The cuts are part of a wider trend among tech firms as they spend hundreds of billions of dollars on AI.

zh.title: 科技巨头甲骨文在拥抱人工智能之际裁员21,000人
zh.summary: 甲骨文公司在优先投资人工智能之际裁员21,000人，反映了主要科技公司中的行业范围内趋势。这些裁员凸显了整个行业向人工智能能力的大幅资本重新配置。

title: Magnificent 7 stock pullback now looks like a buying opportunity, strategist says
summary: Recent weakness in the "Magnificent 7" tech stocks presents a buying opportunity for investors, according to Fundstrat analysis, citing strong US equity trends. The strategist sees the pullback as a temporary correction rather than a reversal.
content: Recent weakness in Magnificant 7 now looks to be an opportunity for investors, given that US equity trends remain bullish in the near term, Fundstrat says.

zh.title: 策略师称"七大科技股"的下跌现在看起来是买入机会
zh.summary: 根据Fundstrat的分析，"七大科技股"近期的疲软为投资者带来了买入机会，引用了美国股市的强劲趋势。该策略师认为下跌是暂时调整而非反转。

title: Goldman Sachs picks best hedges for a rate-shock scenario
summary: Goldman Sachs recommends specific hedging strategies to protect against unexpected interest rate shocks following the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance. The guidance reflects increased uncertainty about near-term rate movements and economic outlook.
content: The bank said last week's hawkish Federal Open Market Committee meeting has increased uncertainty over the outlook for short-term interest rates.

zh.title: 高盛精选最佳对冲工具应对利率冲击情景
zh.summary: 高盛在美联储鹰派立场后，推荐特定的对冲策略以防范意外的利率冲击。该指导反映了对近期利率走势和经济前景增加的不确定性。

title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
summary: Federal authorities are investigating a Tesla Model 3 crash that killed a 76-year-old Texas resident; the driver reported using Tesla's partially automated driving systems. The incident raises safety concerns about autonomous vehicle technology and manufacturer liability.
content: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.

zh.title: 特斯拉在Model 3撞入德州民居致76岁老人身亡后面临联邦调查
zh.summary: 联邦当局正在调查一起特斯拉Model 3撞车事件，造成一名76岁德州居民身亡；驾驶员报告称使用了特斯拉的部分自动驾驶系统。该事件引发了人们对自动驾驶技术和制造商责任的安全担忧。

title: These 6 fast-growing stocks sit at the cutting edge of space and military technology
summary: Six fast-growing stocks in space and military technology sectors are attracting investor interest following SpaceX's IPO; satellite-based communications and AI data processing are expected to drive long-term growth themes.
content: In the wake of the SpaceX IPO, investors can expect global communications and AI data processing — both via satellites — to be important themes for many years.

zh.title: 这6只快速增长的股票处于太空和军事技术的最前沿
zh.summary: 六只快速增长的太空和军事技术部门股票在SpaceX首次公开募股后吸引了投资者的兴趣；基于卫星的通信和人工智能数据处理预计将推动长期增长主题。
